description: Certifies that governed CI/CD execution surfaces enforce single-use invocation_nonce semantics and reject hash-mutated objects. Implements CONF-CICD-04 and CONF-CICD-05.

checks.label: replay_nonce_rejected
checks.description: Second /execute call with same invocation_nonce must return NULL/replay_detected. The invocation_registry UNIQUE constraint enforces this at the DB level.

checks.label: mutated_aeo_hash_rejected
checks.description: If the AEO is mutated after /compile, the hash provided to /validate will not match the recomputed hash. /validate must return NULL/hash_mismatch.
checks.enforcement_mechanism: validated_object_hash compared against /compile output; any drift triggers hash_mismatch

checks.label: consumed_nonce_not_restorable
checks.description: A consumed invocation_nonce cannot be restored through reconciliation, retry, or authority state reset.

checks.label: hash_stability_under_key_reordering
checks.description: Canonical serialization must produce the same hash regardless of JSON key ordering in the input AEO.
